{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604333190094668568","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太好看了，推荐推荐。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770524512,"group_id":"7601927289168743449","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7vKFtygexf2MqzwfdoM3NIPzZQwltVbpUGl6brTnWdj","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1198912134713727","user_name":"北舒城的奥特王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1198912134713727","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601927289168743449","book_info":{"abstract":"#强强 #权谋 #君臣 #虐恋情深 #HE #古风 #双向奔赴 #生死相随
一群穿越者干不过古代丞相皇帝座山观虎斗……还有对自己丞相滴骄傲，是朕的～
楔子·一眼成劫
新帝登基，冕旒垂玉，天下在握。
御阶之下，群臣俯首，唯有一人紫袍玉立，清冷如雪。
年轻的帝王目光扫过，却在那截比白玉更晃眼的脖颈上——停留了三息。
这一眼，是劫，是弈，是万里江山都抵不过的心动伊始。
棋局终，山河定。
始于冕旒一眼，陷于紫袍风华。
弈过权谋天下，落子无悔情深。
他以病骨支离，承你雷霆雨露；
你以万里江山，聘他白首同心。
血火淬炼真心，岁月沉淀眷恋。
生则同衾理政，死则同穴长眠。
青史载其功业，民间传其深情。
元平盛世，双星辉映；
千秋之后，传奇不息。
——幸得一人心，白首不相离。
帝王之弈，终胜于卿心。
强强对峙，双向沉沦
帝王攻×病弱丞相受，谢玄强势偏执却甘为一人放下江山，沈晏清冷谋臣终为一人动摇心防。权谋与深情交织，谁也不曾真正输赢。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/043d1b292eded5fb639e91063125d987~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"宝库聚神","author_id":"","book_id":"7601927289168743449","book_name":"帝王以江山为牢，囚一人终老","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#300808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1317,"name":"古言权谋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1317&name=古言权谋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":460,"name":"独宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=460&name=独宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1456,"name":"位尊权重","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1456&name=位尊权重&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601941079654416921","read_count":"842","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"643003"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"189","tags":"双男主,古言权谋,独宠,位尊权重,腹黑,双洁,强强","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/043d1b292eded5fb639e91063125d987~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180927&x-signature=9qB77NDFPv398X5fRCwZT95Z3Zc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2137047272000791","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score"
